channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Savannah Chrisley and Robert Shiver's Relationship Ends for Good in 2026
item.description: Savannah Chrisley and Robert Shiver's on-and-off relationship has come to a definitive end in 2026. The couple’s first breakup occurred in March 2025 due to ongoing personal issues and the unresolved ...

item.description: Regina marked the 81st anniversary of the Battle of the Atlantic, a pivotal campaign in World War II that was crucial to securing vital supply lines across the ocean. The commemoration featured ceremo...

item.title: ANC’s silence over Tolashe SUV saga deepens governance crisis

item.title: Government Proposes 5% Tax on Imported Second-Hand Clothes to Broaden Revenue Base
item.description: The Kenyan government has come up with a new proposal in the draft Finance Bill 2026 to slap a 5 percent tax on income from mitumba imports. Mitumba, which are second-hand clothes, footwear and relate...

item.title: Naivasha Faces Rising ENT Infections Linked to Farm Chemicals and Fluoride in Water

item.title: Trump Administration Fires Entire National Science Foundation Board, Sparking Anti-Science Concerns
item.description: The article discusses rising mental health issues among teenagers, attributing them partly to global challenges like climate change and potential nuclear threats, rather than solely personal factors. ...

item.title: PDP extends deadline for sale of 2027 election nomination forms
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), backed by FCT Minister Nyesom Wike, don extend the period for aspirants to buy their expression of interest and nomination forms for the 2027 general elections. Ori...

item.title: How the Met Gala Became Fashion’s Biggest Night on the First Monday in May
item.description: The Met Gala, widely known as fashion’s biggest night out, has grown from a modest winter fundraiser into a global cultural spectacle held annually on the first Monday in May. Originally founded in 19...

item.title: Karachi faces extreme heat, experts advise safety measures
item.description: KARACHI is currently experiencing an intense heatwave with temperatures reaching 41°C and humidity dropping as low as 8%, according to the Meteorological Department. Hot and dry north-westerly winds a...

item.title: Big Tech and the Hidden Environmental Impact of Data Centres

item.title: Gateway expands Yandal gold project with 4km mineralised zone and promising high-grade results
item.description: Gateway Mining has significantly expanded the scale of its Yandal gold project in Western Australia, identifying a continuous 4-kilometre stretch of shallow oxide gold mineralisation at its Haflinger ...

item.title: Moderate 5.2-Magnitude Earthquake Felt in Islamabad and Rawalpindi
item.description: On Monday morning, residents of Islamabad and Rawalpindi experienced tremors as a 5.2-magnitude earthquake occurred at 10:56am, according to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD). The quake's e...

item.title: East African Community Strengthens Regional Preparedness for Future Outbreaks

item.title: Iran issues warning to US over naval operations in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On Monday, Iran's military publicly warned the United States Navy to avoid entering the Strait of Hormuz, heightening tensions in the region. This warning came shortly after US President Donald Trump ...
